source_title: Instability Excellence Portfolio Brochure (Redefining peak performance)
text: a 10-degree divergent angle. Posterior Glenoid Drill Guide Hook to secure position on anterior glenoid Ratcheting bullets help to maintain position Double Glenoid Guide with same 10mm drill offset as Coracoid Prep Tool Arthroscopic Latarjet and Bone Block Tray Double ENDOBUTTON◊ Fixation Device A new type of fixation… - Demonstrated healing rates of over 90% in patients with shoulder instability25-30 - Shown to be biomechanically equivalent to screw fixation*31 - Reduced procedure complications due to hardware, when compared to standard screw fixation**32 - In a study of patients with chronic recurrent anterior gleno-humeral instability, 82.1% returned to sport at the preinjury level***28 *As demonstrated in the Latarjet-Bristow procedure **n=27 vs 115 screws ***n=28 Abduction Lateral traction Rotation Flexion Arthroscopic Enabling Technology FLOW 90◊ COBLATION◊ Wand - Significantly faster ablation rate than other frequently used 90-degree arthroscopy wands*37 - Significantly more efficient at ablation than other frequently used 90-degree arthroscopy wands**37 *As demonstrated in vitro when tested at default settings; p < 0.05 **As demonstrated in vitro when tested at default settings; p < 0.01 DYONICS ◊ PLATINUM FL YER ◊ Shaver Blade - Minimizes potential for damage to surrounding tissues during insertion and removal*38 *n=8 ACUFEX◊ ACCESS Positioning System - Lateral decubitus positioning made easy33 - Designed with ease of use in mind, this lightweight34 and stable solution35, 36 gives you unimpeded access to the repair site. 33-35 Suture Passing ACCU-PASS ◊ Disposable Suture Shuttles Controlled with a simple thumb wheel for one-handed operation; available in eight different tip configurations. - Options provide flexibility in both procedure and technique - Solid one-piece shaft designed to resist bending and breakage - Sterile, single patient use - Suture passing and shuttling for instability, plications and side to side repairs FIRSTPASS ◊ MINI Family of Suture Passers With the goal of providing a reliable, versatile and easy-to-use system, these suture passers are designed to help facilitate procedures executed in tight spaces. - Reliability through a fully-disposable system with a preloaded needle 39-42 - Versatility to pass #2 ULTRABRAID ◊ Suture or ULTRATAPE ◊ Suture - Accessibility through straight and 17-degree left and right curved jaw
